stemHtml: Which statement about stick force per g is correct?

options.a: The stick force per g increases, when centre of gravity is moved aft.
options.b: If the slope of the stick force versus load factor line becomes negative, generally speaking this is not a problem for control of an aeroplane.
options.c: The stick force per g must have both an upper and lower limit in order to ensure acceptable control characteristics.
options.d: The stick force per g can only be corrected by means of electronic devices (stability augmentation) in case of an unacceptable value.
